title: cancrinia discoidea
intro: Cancrinia discoidea, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cancrinia discoidea include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in many herbal preparations. Cancrinia discoidea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
